note: Shipped 0.20.0: per-session attach/kill pickers + the changelog live-session dot, presentation/interaction-only in cli/internal/tui/ over the same contract.Repo. A single flow diagram carries the signal - control-flow branching (attach 0/1/>=2, kill 1 vs >=2, completion routing through binding.selected) plus the changelog dot; a before/ set enables compare mode.
